## What's Changed in 0.0.88

- Remove duplicate translation key
- Update baselineprofiles + tweak compose compiler config
- Fix some deprecations
- Expand Search Functionality
- AGP 9 upgrade
- Fix scroll stuck/glitchy in comments when scrolling up to an image
- Implement view pooling for AndroidViews
- Fix lint due to new unescaped translation from weblate
- Changing renovate to monthly
- Improve ImageViewerScreen logging
- Upgrade room-db-export to toast failure messages

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LemmyNet/jerboa/compare/0.0.87...0.0.88
